/CAL: DEFENDANT BRETT NEELY'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY- STATUS OF COMPLIANCE/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENSE COUNSEL OR THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/X: PRESENT IN COURT FOR SFPD LEGAL IS RONNIE WAGNER,/OC

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY- STATUS OF COMPLIANCE/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY, APPEARING FOR SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS RONNIE WAGNER,/X: THE SF DISTRICT ATTORNEY AND SFPD HAVE NOT COMPLIED WITH THE COURT'S 03-06-18 RULING REGARDING THE RETURN OF PROPERTY (TO DEFENDANT BRETT NEELY) IDENTIFIED IN THE WRITTEN ORDER FILED ON 03-06-18,/CTORD: THE SAN FRANCISCO DISTRICT ATTORNEY AND SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT ARE ORDERED TO RETURNTHE FOLLOWING ITEMS NO LATER THAN 09-18-18://X: ONE (1) I PHONE 6 PLUS, ONE (1) DESKTOP APPLE COMPUTER AND THREE (3) USB DRIVES, SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/CONTD: DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY-STATUS OF COMPLIANCE
/CAL: STATUS OF DEFENDANT'S RETURN OF PROPERTY MOTION/NP/X: NO APPEARANCEBY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/X: APPEARING IN COURT FOR SFPD LEGAL IS RONNIE WAGNER,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/NP/X: RONNIE WAGNER PRESENT IN COURT FOR SFPD LEGAL,/X: THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT,/MO GRTD/CTORD: AS TO ONE IPHONE 6 PLUS, ONE DESKTOP APPLE COMPUTER ANDTHREE USB DRIVES, SEE WRITTEN ORDER/CONTD: STATUS-REVIEW OF PROPERTY RETURN

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X: ALSO PRESENT IN COURT IS RONNIE WAGNER, SFPD LEGAL,/X: NO APPEARANCE BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/CTORD: MOTION GRANTED IN PART, SEE WRITTEN ORDER/CONTD: DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY REGARDING REMAINING ITEMS/
